events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess S-trap illegal siphon-prone config in residential plumbing rough-complete. Decision fail because non-compliant. Risk high? S-trap can siphon trap seal, allowing sewer gas, health hazard. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 60? value not asked 0. confidence 1.0. findings: S-trap installed, prohibited by IPC/UPC, prone to siphoning, loss of trap seal. actions: replace with P-trap and proper venting per code; install vent within required distance; verify trap seal. rationale. references: IPC 1002.3/UPC 906.1? Need be careful. S-traps prohibited. IPC 1002.3? Actually IPC 1002.3 Trap seals and trap seal protection, 1002.4 prohibits S-traps? Let's recall: IPC Section 1002 Traps, 1002.3 Prohibited traps. S-traps are prohibited except? UPC 906.1 Individual vent? Hmm. S-trap prohibited by IPC 1002.3: "S" traps are prohibited. UPC 1004.1? Let's use IPC 1002.3, UPC 1004.1 maybe. Better to reference generically IPC/UPC trap and venting requirements. The instruction says apply rather than quote mechanically. We can include references like "IPC 1002.3 (Prohibited traps)", "UPC 1004.1 (S-traps prohibited)", "IPC 906.1 / UPC 906.2 venting requirements". Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
